shortTagline: I Build real-world web applications using frontend, backend, and database concepts.
shortBio: I am a BBA-CA student with a strong interest in web development and software engineering. I build dynamic web applications using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Node.js, along with database integration using MySQL. I have experience creating structured projects like DBMS Workbench system and inventory management system with interactive UI and backend logic. I focus on writing clean, scalable code and continuously improving my problem-solving skills. Currently, I am expanding my knowledge in Java and backend development to build complete real-world applications.

focusDetails.title: Frontend Development
focusDetails.description: I focus on building responsive and interactive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I enjoy working on UI design, animations, and improving user experience through clean and structured layouts.

focusDetails.title: Interactive Web Applications
focusDetails.description: I develop dynamic web applications by connecting frontend interfaces with backend logic. I work with JavaScript and frameworks to create smooth, real-time user interactions and structured application flow.

focusDetails.title: Database Management Systems
focusDetails.description: I have practical experience working with databases like MySQL, designing tables, and managing structured data. I build applications that integrate database operations with user interfaces for real-world use cases.
